element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns vehicle control on initial freeway sections
Primary offensive tool, requires no learning curve
Player learns threat identification and evasion patterns
Player learns discrimination between targets; penalty system creates decision tension
Player learns summoning mechanic via dashboard light indicator
Introduces aerial threat and terrain damage mechanics
Player gains agency over route selection and terrain variation
Weapon transformation (oil slick becomes flamethrower) and new navigation rules
Player learns resource economy replaces infinite starting cars

typical_relief_triggers: Clear road sections with minimal enemy density
Scoring counter increment (passive point gain while driving safely)
Terrain transitions offering new route options
typical_tension_triggers: Helicopter bomb drops creating road hazards
Loss of car triggering weapon loss
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High sustained tension with periodic relief windows; game lacks definitive ending, creating escalating difficulty loop

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Weapons van summoning via dashboard light indicates availability; road forks signal territory transitions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Unlimited car supply during lead-in period; introduction of basic enemies and civilian vehicles; simple weapon acquisition
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Score threshold system replaces infinite lives; helicopter introduced; special weapons become critical; terrain and weather variation increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating enemy density and helicopter activity; speedboat sequences introduce new threat patterns; sustained attrition as mistakes become costly
notable_spikes: Transition from unlimited lives to earned-life economy
Introduction of helicopter aerial bombing mechanic
Forced boathouse conversion requiring adaptation of weapon strategy

notable_level_patterns.description: Road forks present optional route selection leading to new regions with distinct terrain, weather, and enemy configurations; weapons van appears in each territory
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages 5-6 feature animated tile sequences indicating environmental progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Boathouse forces or allows temporary conversion from car to speedboat with modified weapon set and aerial/aquatic threats
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-to-late game sections; helicopter remains threat above water

notable_level_patterns.description: Score counter increments passively while on-road; destroying civilian vehicles halts counter; off-road driving halts counter; creates constant micro-tension around route safety
